content: Fitness app benchmarks: stickiness=DAU/MAU avg 37% all industries, good fitness DAU/MAU 20-30%. Retention D1 30-35%, D7 15-20%, D30 8-12%. Activation D1 26% dropping to 10% by D28. Churn 9.2%/month. Strongest churn signal: users with <3 workouts in first 14 days churn 3-4x. Heavy seasonality (Jan spike) so compare cohort-over-cohort same quarter.
